description: This file defines an immutable Dart class 'Recipe' representing a recipe model, including properties such as id, title, description, category, preparation and cooking times, ingredients, steps, tags, and a flag indicating if it is user-created. It provides methods for copying, serialization to/from map and JSON, and computed totalMinutes.

classes.name: Recipe
classes.description: An immutable data class representing a recipe, with serialization and copy capabilities.

methods.name: copyWith
methods.description: Creates a copy of the Recipe instance with optional new values for fields.

methods.name: toMap
methods.description: Serializes the Recipe instance into a Map<String, Object?>.

methods.name: fromMap
methods.description: Deserializes a Map<String, Object?> into a Recipe instance.

methods.name: toJson
methods.description: Converts the Recipe instance into a JSON string.

methods.name: fromJson
methods.description: Creates a Recipe instance from a JSON string.
